creator: rodolfo.manin@gmail.com
text:
Version: 9.1.1

Problem:

'mgmtd -C' ("check config") crashes with the message:

2024/07/30 16:29:04 MGMTD: [YKHB9-ND03T] FE-client: msg_conn_send_msg: can't send message on closed connection
2024/07/30 16:29:04 MGMTD: lib/vty.c:1684: vty_new(): assertion (new->mgmt_session_id != 0) failed, extra info: Failed to create client session for VTY
MGMTD: Received signal 6 at 1722367744 (si_addr 0x0); aborting...
MGMTD: ?                                     8227ccbc9        821065130 /usr/local/lib/libfrr.so.0 (mapped at 0x822696000)
MGMTD: ?                                     822800b01        821065260 /usr/local/lib/libfrr.so.0 (mapped at 0x822696000)
MGMTD: ?                                     824cc854d        8210652c0 /lib/libthr.so.3 (mapped at 0x824cae000)
MGMTD: ?                                     824cc7afb        821065680 /lib/libthr.so.3 (mapped at 0x824cae000)
MGMTD:     ---- signal ----
MGMTD: ?                                     82190f2d3        8210656f0
MGMTD: __sys_thr_kill+0xa                    826e2386a        821065ca8 /lib/libc.so.7 (mapped at 0x826cec000)
MGMTD: raise+0x34                            826d9bf54        821065cb0 /lib/libc.so.7 (mapped at 0x826cec000)
MGMTD: abort+0x49                            826e4cfc9        821065ce0 /lib/libc.so.7 (mapped at 0x826cec000)
MGMTD: ?                                     822830a3b        821065d20 /usr/local/lib/libfrr.so.0 (mapped at 0x822696000)
MGMTD: ?                                     822817a5a        821065e20 /usr/local/lib/libfrr.so.0 (mapped at 0x822696000)
MGMTD: ?                                     822818d70        821065e40 /usr/local/lib/libfrr.so.0 (mapped at 0x822696000)
MGMTD: ?                                     8227c3135        821065e80 /usr/local/lib/libfrr.so.0 (mapped at 0x822696000)
MGMTD: ?                                     8227c3033        8210662c0 /usr/local/lib/libfrr.so.0 (mapped at 0x822696000)
MGMTD: ?                                        217db6        821066360 /usr/local/sbin/mgmtd (mapped at 0x200000)
MGMTD: __libc_start1+0x12a                   826d70afa        821066390 /lib/libc.so.7 (mapped at 0x826cec000)
MGMTD: ?                                        217c40        8210663e0 /usr/local/sbin/mgmtd (mapped at 0x200000)
MGMTD: no thread information available

How to reproduce:

- Create a configuration file on /usr/local/etc/frr/mgmtd.conf (a empty file should do)
- Run 'mgmtd -C'

Note:

'mgmtd' is required by 'staticd' on frr9, which is required for FRR to support static routes.  As frr9's startup script ('/usr/local/etc/rc.d/frr') runs 'mgmtd -C' when the daemon 'mgmtd' is enabled on the configuration file, the crash will abort the script, which may prevent the entire routing suite from starting up on boot.
